  • Constructor Details

    • ReportsController

      public ReportsController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
      Initializes the report screen. It sets up the cell value factories for the columns in the report tables.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable
      Parameters:
      url - the location used to resolve relative paths for the root object.
      resourceBundle - the resource used to localize the root object.

    • getAppointmentsByType

      public void getAppointmentsByType()
      retrieves all appointments by type from the database and populates the tableview.

    • getAppointmentsByMonth

      public void getAppointmentsByMonth()
      Retrieves all appointments by month from the database and populates the tableview.

    • getContactsSchedule

      public void getContactsSchedule() throws SQLException
      Retrieves the schedule of appointments for the selected contact from the database and populates the tableview.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if an error occurs while accessing the database.

    • appointmentsButton

      public void appointmentsButton(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method handles the Appointment Screen button. It navigates the user back to the Appointments screen.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The appointment button click event.
      Throws:
      IOException - if the AppointmentScreen.fxml file cannot be loaded.

    • customerButton

      public void customerButton(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method handles the Customer Information Screen button. It navigates the user back to the Customer Information screen.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The customer information button click event.
      Throws:
      IOException - if the CustomerInformationScreen.fxml file cannot be loaded.
